text:
極上のコシを生み出すには
最高の器具と、最高の足が必要！
これ、冗談じゃなくね。

踏むことでコシを出す。
料理人の中では常識なのよ。

そして私が考えたのは、その段取りを
安定化させ、自動にするための手段。

たぶん、いいえ、必ず最高の器具が
作り出せるはず……
だから、よろしくお願い

If you want to get that perfect chewiness, you
need the right equipment and the right legs to
get it done! And don't think I'm kidding.

It's good legwork that really helps give your
food the texture you want.
Any good chef knows that.

So what I want to try and do is automate the
steps to replicate the same process every time.

I'm pretty sure, no, I'm positive this will help
me make the very best kitchen appliance yet!
So... Thanks in advance!
